_comment: AltirraSDL WASM host config.  Copied verbatim into the deployed bundle as config.json next to AltirraSDL.html.  Read once at startup by wasm_index.html.in's loadHostConfig() to drive the first-run firmware/game-pack wizard.
_comment_packs: Each entry in gamePacks[] becomes an opt-in checkbox in the wizard.  url is fetched, unpacked into /home/web_user/games/<sanitized-name>/.  The lobby's "Curated Software Library" section on the welcome page reads from the same library/ tree directly (one game at a time), so an installed pack and the lobby grid stay in sync.  The Demoscene tab in the lobby is intentionally NOT a wizard pack — those titles stream on click only.

gamePacks.name: Curated Atari 8-bit Library
gamePacks.description: ~196 classic + modern titles with screenshots (~9 MB)
